body.title: Reorder preparse — graph-tree lookup BEFORE cortex.search
body.result: gist_gate.should_skip_memory_search() + main.py wire. Reflex intents (greeting) skip cortex.search when thalamus/BG gist-pass is confident (habit selected OR confidence≥0.7, tunable via IGOR_GIST_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD). command intent preserved unconditional skip. 9 tests, all green. Commit 1f92d6f4.
body.description:
Currently preparse runs cortex.search (full memory retrieval) for all non-command input, regardless of whether the input matches a known habit or tree-node pattern. For reflex intents (greeting, ack, farewell, simple command) the retrieval is wasted work — adds latency with no decision value. Reorder: first pass is graph-tree gist lookup (habit_list match + hot_attractors + NE-predict). If gist-pass returns high-confidence classification for a reflex intent, skip cortex.search entirely. If gist-pass is low-confidence, fall through to cortex.search as today. This is a classic monkey-brain pattern (gist-then-detail) and should cut user-facing preparse latency significantly for common inputs.

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/main.py` preparse-call region (approximately lines 4062-4077 per earlier inspection — HIGH-inertia, PRE-APPROVED by Akien 2026-04-22); `tests/test_preparse_ordering.py` new.
**Design rules:** docs-in-code (explain the gist-then-detail ordering in main.py); test-plan-or-why-not (covered); no-sqlite; no-new-memory-schemas.
**Scope boundary:** IN: graph-tree gist-pass before cortex.search; confidence-gated short-circuit for high-confidence reflex intents (greeting, ack, farewell, command); instrumentation (log when short-circuit fires). OUT: confidence calibration across stages (T-confidence-gated-depth follow-on); local LLM fallback (T-local-preparse-fallback).
**Test plan:** input="hi" → gist matches greeting habit with high confidence → cortex.search NOT called; input="can you explain how X works in this codebase?" → gist low-confidence → cortex.search IS called; latency measurement — short-circuit path ≤100ms p50 vs pre-change baseline (20s+); instrumentation emits short_circuit_fired counter.
